task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template and extract all resource logical IDs that are of type 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
solution_criteria: Function should accept a CloudFormation template (dict or JSON string), return a list of logical IDs for S3 buckets, handle nested resources, and work with templates of varying complexity

task: Create a JSON policy document that allows an IAM user to perform only GetObject and PutObject actions on a specific S3 bucket named 'my-app-bucket'
solution_criteria: Valid IAM policy JSON with correct statement structure, specifies only GetObject and PutObject actions, targets the correct S3 bucket ARN and objects within it, follows AWS policy formatting standards

task: Extract all AWS resource ARNs from an unstructured log file using a regex pattern that matches the standard ARN format
solution_criteria: Regex pattern should match valid AWS ARN format (arn:aws:service:region:account-id:resource), correctly capture ARNs with various resource types (S3, EC2, Lambda, RDS, etc.), avoid false positives, and work with ARNs containing colons and hyphens
